columns.Suburb: Suburb where the property is located
columns.Rooms: Number of rooms in the property
columns.Type: Property type (h = House, u = Unit, t = Townhouse)
columns.Method: Sale method (S = Sold, SP = Sold Prior, PI = Passed In, VB = Vendor Bid, SA = Sold After)
columns.SellerG: Real estate agent or agency name
columns.Distance: Distance from Melbourne CBD in kilometers
columns.Propertycount: Number of properties in the suburb
